nodes.label: Backend Ticket Model Unit Tests  Test suite for ticket model definition, state e
ATB-1.2.2: Verify TicketStatus enum has correct values.
Verify all expected status enum values exist.
Verify enum values are string-based for database storage.
Verify PENDING status exists for initial ticket state.
Verify IN_REVIEW status exists for tickets under approval.
Verify ApprovalAction enum has correct values for approval operations.
Verify all expected action enum values exist.
ATB-1.2.1: Verify Ticket model has correct structure and fields.
Verify Ticket model has primary key id field.
Verify Ticket model has title field for ticket identification.
Verify Ticket model has content field for ticket description.
Verify Ticket model has status field for state machine.
Verify Ticket model has created_at timestamp.
Verify Ticket model has updated_at timestamp for tracking changes.
Verify Ticket model has creator_id for tracking ticket owner.
Verify Ticket model has approver_id for approval assignment.
Verify Ticket model has reason field for rejection/approval notes.
ATB-1.2.3: Verify Ticket model relationships with ApprovalHistory.
Verify Ticket has one-to-many relationship with ApprovalHistory.
Verify ApprovalHistory has foreign key to Ticket.
ATB-1.2.4: Verify Ticket model constraints and validators.
Verify title field has reasonable max length constraint.
Verify content field can store large descriptions.
Verify reason field is optional (nullable) for pending tickets.
Verify Ticket model has correct default values.
Verify new tickets default to PENDING status.
Verify state transitions are properly tracked.
Verify ticket status can be set to valid states.
Verify status values can be compared for transition validation.
Verify ApprovalHistory references ticket via ticket_id.
Verify ApprovalHistory records the action taken.
Verify ApprovalHistory tracks who performed the action.
Verify ApprovalHistory has timestamp for audit trail.
Verify ApprovalHistory records previous status for transition tracking.
Verify ApprovalHistory records new status after transition.
Verify Ticket supports audit trail functionality.
Verify ticket records last update timestamp.
Verify Ticket model supports approval workflow.
Verify ticket can identify assigned approver.
Verify ticket can store rejection reason.
Integration tests for Ticket model.     These tests require a real database conn
Verify ticket can be created and persisted.
Verify ticket status can be updated.
Verify approval history can be recorded.
ATB-1.2.3: Verify approval history is deleted when ticket is deleted.
